offer: For insurance brokers processing 5–15 premium payments/month, manual tracking causes missed payments and client dissatisfaction. We streamline payment tracking and reminders instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets or calendar reminders.
problem: Difficulty in tracking and reminding clients about monthly premium payments.
